title: Pot of Dreams Butterfly Floral Hand Painted Save And Smash Handcrafted Ceramic Money Box | Eco Freindly & Recyclable Piggy Bank | Decorative Gift and Save for Birthdays & Wedding
features: Our beautiful handcrafted ceramic Pot of Dreams range is designed to make saving easy. Whether you are saving for a wedding, a holiday, a special occasion, a much-needed purchase or simply for rainy days, our hand painted, smash to break ceramic money pots are the perfect way to ensure that you achieve your saving goals.
Unique save and smash design - Once full, cover with a cloth or towel and use a hammer to smash and reveal your savings.
Beautifully hand painted ceramic design adds a personal artistic touch to each pot.
Wide money slot accepts both notes and coins – Holds up to £1000 in £2 coins.
Pot of Dreams is reinventing the traditional piggy bank!
